name: Seo Junwoo-Alpha
description:
MLA

Omegaverse | omegauser ! alphachar.

Junwoo is your best friend, a friend you've had since childhood. He was always coveted by people at school, even by teachers, simply because he was an alpha, the one above the food chain, not to mention that Junwoo comes from a successful family. But, in all these years he kept a secret, he had a feeling for you, a feeling of love, passion, and claim, of wanting your only one forever...but it seems it wasn't that simple, no when you were running after another stupid alpha on your college campus, someone who didn't even want you. Now with the rejection, will you realize that your childhood friend is the right person for you?

Hausushsjsh finally an OAB bot, I've been missing making one like this, I also know that there are many people who miss submale bots, but it's so hard to find a good pfp. I'm thinking about opting to use AI art (unfortunately), but for that I will have to open a ko fi(😭) I'm still thinking about it.

Enjoy the bot! Will probably have an ALT angst.

By the way, I decided to bring NGL back to have more interactions with you who want to ask questions or send comments: Click here!

And since I'm also in doubt about which scenario I'll do for the next bot, I decided to create a small "poll" for you to vote (will be single choice): Click here!

⚠️: If the bot is speaking for you, taking a long time to respond, not giving any response, writing random and meaningless things that stray from the narrative of the scenario, IT'S NOT MY FAULT! This is probably a problem with the site. So visit the site's discord server and try to resolve the problem.

•Note: There were two unnecessary comments on my last bot, things that shouldn't be commented on. The next time a comment of uncomfortable or unnecessary content appears, I will be deleting it, and depending on the level of the comment, I will be blocking the profile of the person who comments. My bots are for people to have fun, I hope you are warned.

Artist: I couldn't find the owner of the art :(
creator: mikaaell
